description: Baseline for Web UI theme color governance. Lower values when debt is removed; do not raise without a documented review reason.

nonContractDynamicInputs.owner: app gallery, skills, miniapp, agent, and nursery card surfaces
nonContractDynamicInputs.reason: Per-item animation staggering input. It is data-driven and should not become a global theme token.
Runtime group color used to distinguish user-visible content groups. Merging would remove data identity.
Runtime tag color comes from context-tag configuration. It distinguishes tag type and should remain a dynamic input.

nonContractCssPrivate.reason: State-local surface token switches success/loading/error/warning/action backgrounds inside one component contract.
Shared editor-private layout metric for matching list marker columns across paired markdown editor implementations.
Shared editor-private task-list layout metric; not an app theme color or product semantic token.
Shared editor-private list spacing metric needed to align list marker and content columns.
Shared editor-private nested-list indent metric; promoting it globally would blur editor layout ownership.
Component-local layout offset used by the paired ACP column/header styles.

nonContractCssPrivate.owner: configuration page layout and review team page
nonContractCssPrivate.reason: Configuration-page layout contract shared by the common layout and review-team specialization.

nonContractCssPrivate.owner: configuration page layout and review team page
nonContractCssPrivate.reason: Configuration-page width contract shared by the common layout and review-team specialization.
Component default for runtime member accent colors; individual cards may override it with member-specific colors.
